name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Beto wants to chat with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there,
**Yesterday, Beto made it official: he's visited all 254 counties in Texas.** This is an incredible achievement for our campaign, and it wouldn't have been possible without your support!
Beto asked us to put together a special conference call with his top supporters this week. He's going to jump on the phone to give you an update on where we are in this race and what our campaign needs to do next. **Can you join us?**
**Campaign Update with Beto**
**Date:** This Wednesday, June 13
**Time:** 6:45 pm CT (4:45 pm PT / 7:45 pm ET)
**[RSVP FOR Campaign Update with Beto](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212c/3b1d797/7fe0985a/35a85380/3560166908/VEsH/ "https://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/UQXV4LENA5MJ9DF")**
Over the past year and all across Texas, Beto's had the opportunity to hear from people about their vision for our future and what we can do to achieve it. He wants to bring everyone together on a quick check-in call to talk about what we're going to do as a grassroots campaign to win in November.
[**RSVP to join Beto on Wednesday for a quick call and help grow our movement.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212c/3b1d797/7fe0985a/35a85380/3560166908/VEsE/ "https://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/UQXV4LENA5MJ9DF")
Thanks for all you do,
Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

name: Bob Casey
subject: thanks for your support

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66bd/51dbcc2a/659f13e/3a50ee0/492173653/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

Hi team,

I just wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_.

Ever since voters re-affirmed their support for me during our Primary election, the energy here in the Commonwealth has been remarkable. Pennsylvanians are ready to get out the vote for Democrats up and down the ticket, and they're already showing up to get it done. I never take that support for granted, and I'm truly honored by their confidence heading into the general election.

This election is important, I don't need to tell you that, and the work is only just beginning. If we want to make sure PA goes blue in November, I'm going to need your help.

This race will only get tougher. The GOP is already coming after me, and I expect that they'll double-down now that the general election is in full swing. After winning statewide in 2016, Republicans want nothing more than to see PA go red again in 2018 -- we need to do everything we can to make sure that doesn't happen.

**With that in mind, will you make a $5 investment in Pennsylvania today? It has never been more important to make sure that this campaign is ready to fight back against Republican attacks and to spread our message to every corner of the Commonwealth.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66bd/51dbcc2a/659f13e/3a50ee1/492173653/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYxMF9mcjJfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180610_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thank you for being part of our team. We can win in November if we work together.

Bob

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Mark your calendar. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2b5435a8c056c13d22a749d804e8808207cc5c21125d6d024f87013fcf3dec63c8770a35c3b82b2b76a41bbd1ac61cea180b0bbf6f0884f3)
---

Friend,

I want you to enter for the chance to meet me at an important lunch I'm hosting in Milwaukee, Wisconsin later this month.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump prepares to meet Kim Jong Un
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d94bb6ac2b4de8205d9d7516495af3af62de52f58da483e5535906814de72d70415d0882fa56f636a1e47dacdc6643e66e) The White House • June 11, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will meet with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in Singapore at 9 p.m. ET. |
---
|

## President Trump prepares to meet Kim Jong Un
**President Trump arrived in Singapore over the weekend** , where he will hold his much-anticipated meeting with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un. President Trump and Chairman Kim will first sit down one-on-one, with translators only, before participating in an expanded bilateral meeting and a working lunch.
**The President met with Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong** earlier today. President Trump thanked Prime Minister Lee for Singapore's generosity and partnership in hosting his meeting with Chairman Kim, and the two discussed ways to promote greater stability, security, and prosperity in the region.
**President Trump attended the 44th G-7 summit in Canada** this weekend before landing in Singapore. "The remarkably strong U.S. economy holds some key lessons for other economically advanced democracies," Larry Kudlow, Director of the White House's National Economic Council, wrote Friday. "There's a simple lesson in President Trump's record of achievement: Believe him."
[Watch highlights of President Trump's first meeting in Singapore.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d914661a85f59afd6f2f47e7136d4ac11e7f957ea832cad2a641c2dd211e1cc8da40060760166a6e0c9e823489d610c362)
**More** : ["Trump Is Presiding Over Extraordinary Growth. G-7 Leaders Should Notice."](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d94618eb4e110b1ec9e014d864139da42021e12ed7e51870d0ea29458913d5bf31236c906e3aad572ae9f13065b01dbc7b)

---
|

## Celebrate National Flag Week
**President Trump proclaimed this week as National Flag Week** , which will include National Flag Day this Thursday, June 14. "More than two centuries ago, on June 14, 1777, the Second Continental Congress formally adopted the Stars and Stripes as the official flag of our new Republic," the President writes in his Proclamation.
**Honoring our Nation's emblems is important for this President**. Last week, the White House hosted a Celebration of America, which included a stirring reminder of why we stand proudly for our National Anthem. This week's Proclamation is no different: "Our flag symbolizes our solemn pride and eternal gratitude to our service members, who willingly raise their hand in front of our Nation's colors and take an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States."
[Read President Trump explain what the American flag symbolizes.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d94133afbdd245b8ae8f69b40362f52a84278367465e1362d7e90ff8d3f0be8c0c1a5fde5f66a67b604bcdc2cf153d7043)
**Watch** : [The best moments from last week's Celebration of America ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d9e4658e2be39f8a1a6455eccce44759adf292591470d63e6e2ef881089ad4a5728501591c34b7b2cc5618e9fd5c73d281)
---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump talks with Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong of Singapore** | June 11, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d900a155499c34a5840ba3ac8529bd74f5ae57a0d0c0819d5da3ab9dc6f679617559da7ae2143cac77e48735bda3a93b8c) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a9567ab67722f0d9fbff3fedac83bb71e0b4077e510b3b956963697ade3196a311a412f66953af1e31ac4931d32aea86152415c8f6bcc7ed) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48898376e6300c2f980791693ab93e3c7e8857c8870a68efbbbdb550c7a99371d5b9ac3cad16c0716f8a1de60d1d84ab28605b78cf3b4dfd0)

subject: Will you start a monthly donation to the DNC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request matters so much at this moment. I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.
---
Derek --

In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a monthly sustaining contribution to the Democratic Party. Before I do that, I want to tell you why this request matters so much at this moment.

We are smack in the middle of a critical election year. There are great Democratic candidates running in every part of this country -- and they need resources to help them get their message out and win.

Here's the truth, Derek: The investments we make over the summer will determine wins and losses in November -- and we need your help to invest in grassroots organizing in every single state.

That's why I am asking:

**[Will you make a monthly sustaining donation today to help Democrats organize nationwide and win in November? Any amount you can contribute will make a difference.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c11/4067b0a/647ebafcf/7fb8834f/1693171342/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-sustainer-2018?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Will+you++if+consinConsGroup30531+renew+&utm_campaign=em_20180611_tp_s3&source=em_20180611_tp_s3&refcode=em_20180611_tp_s3")**

Over the past year, Democrats have shown what we can accomplish together -- but the truth is that our work is only just beginning.

We can regain a Democratic majority in Congress and stop the GOP's disastrous agenda in its tracks.

We can elect more Democrats at the state and local level -- including fighting for the 6,000 state legislature seats on the ballot this year.

We can continue building a party infrastructure that is capable of taking on Republicans in all 50 states and beating them at the polls.

All of this is possible -- but the only way we will get it done is if we work together with Democrats like you chipping in what you can afford. So, what do you say, Derek?

**[Help sustain this fight for the long haul with a monthly contribution today. Your contribution -- of any amount -- will be critical to helping Democrats win this year and beyond.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c11/4067b0a/647ebafcf/7fb8834c/1693171342/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-sustainer-2018?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Help+sustain+this+fight+for+the+long+hau&utm_campaign=em_20180611_tp_s3&source=em_20180611_tp_s3&refcode=em_20180611_tp_s3")**

Thank you for stepping up today.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pwhkucsrkxAiBiyRupGhzL1eNfXQ7peZDesSs1aeks8=/yovxDdgeJLs9Pi4kKPtARmhnq0WH_hM3oU4kbOn4CdE=) Friends and Neighbors -- Since we first launched, my campaign and I have traveled from the Panhandle to the Everglades, talking to voters about our vision for a better, stronger, more innovative Florida. Along the way, **[we have received the support of many elected officials and groups](https://act.myngp.com/el/pwhkucsrkxAiBiyRupGhzL1eNfXQ7peZDesSs1aeks8=/OYyxMSaBAxOUFTsIkIhtXV3pa5yy-_nQZEFU0-okgTA=)** who represent the people with some of the most important jobs in our state and communities, including our police, fire fighters and first responders. **And today, I am honored to add to that list by announcing that The Florida Education Association (FEA) has recommended our campaign to become Florida 's Chief Financial Officer (CFO)**. I have fought hard for educators, to protect their retirement during my many years in the State Senate. Now, I am committed to doing the same as your next CFO, where I will serve as trustee of the state's retirement funds. name: Jason Yates
subject: Big Day Tomorrow, Peter – Your Vote Is Needed
body:
Hey Peter,
Tomorrow is Election Day in Virginia! Your vote matters in this primary election.
Make sure to double-check your polling place as it may have changed. You can be 100% certain you have the right polling location by using this helpful tool.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fthink%2Ffor-voters%2Ffindpollinglocation&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806111db4pe&n=1)
Pray for God to give you the wisdom to select the candidates who stand for life, religious liberty, family and compassion for those in need.
Peter, these values are under tremendous attack and it’s extremely important that you choose candidates who will firmly defend them. If we don’t choose strong candidates now, we will be disappointed with our options come November.

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hey Friend, We’ve got a lot to talk about! Austin scored a lot of media stories this past week and our volunteer army continues to grow. It seems like every day we have a bigger number of people phone banking and speaking to voters about Austin. We can’t thank you enough for all of your support. **Our campaign manager Jeff Carson featured on the Blaze:** Jeff doesn’t know that I’m including this in the Monday update, so cross your fingers I don’t get in any trouble :) The Blaze interviewed Jeff Carson about the race, his military background, and why he decided to manage Austin’s campaign for Senate. [**You can read the full article here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theblaze.com%2Fnews%2F2018%2F06%2F06%2Fmo-sen-petersens-polling-looks-good-meet-the-veteran-running-the-gop-candidates-campaign&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061118_update&n=1) Here are a few good excerpts: _“So who is this guy running the campaign?_ _From 2004-2008, Jeff Carson was a Patriot missile defense officer and later a ground liaison officer in the U.S. Army, serving all over The Gulf, including Iraq._ _“My whole family is military... Service is in our blood. That’s why I do what I do now; it’s another way I can serve, here on the political side. We have a big problem with politicians and our political system in this country.”_ And here is my favorite: _What drew him to work with Petersen?_ _Carson originally worked for Petersen’s 2016 presidential race. When asked why he signed on for another run, he told TheBlaze, “First and foremost: It’s really, really tough to find good people in politics, who you can trust to make the right decisions — even when it’s difficult._ _“And finding the right candidates? That’s nearly impossible.”_ _But Carson says Petersen is that type of candidate. He said of Austin, “I’ve seen him bribed and even threatened over the time we’ve worked together, and he’s always told the bad guys to take a hike. That’s always stuck with me._ **Campaign stop in Webb City:** Last week, Austin stopped in Webb City with the campaign bus and we got a quick segment on Fox 14. Austin talked about his tax plan and got to meet some new supporters. You can watch his segment on Fox 14 by[**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.fox14tv.com%2Fstory%2F38384316%2Fmissouri-senate-candidate-stop-in-webb-city&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061118_update&n=2) **Local media coverage:** The media stories don’t stop! Our campaign manager Jeff Carson featured on the Blaze: Jeff doesn’t know that I’m including this in the Monday update, so cross your fingers I don’t get in any trouble :) The Blaze interviewed Jeff Carson about the race, his military background, and why he decided to manage Austin’s campaign for Senate. Here are a few good excerpts: “So who is this guy running the campaign? From 2004-2008, Jeff Carson was a Patriot missile defense officer and later a ground liaison officer in the U.S. Army, serving all over The Gulf, including Iraq. “My whole family is military... Service is in our blood. That’s why I do what I do now; it’s another way I can serve, here on the political side. We have a big problem with politicians and our political system in this country.” And here is my favorite: What drew him to work with Petersen? Carson originally worked for Petersen’s 2016 presidential race. name: Lewis Cohen
subject: Steve King, Don't Let The Door...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
As you’ve probably heard, last week J.D. Scholten won the Democratic primary and is now the official nominee running against Steve King in Iowa’s 4th Congressional District.
Here at Team Scholten, we’ve worked incredibly hard over the past year to put J.D. in this position, but now the real work begins. Now that all the primary hoopla has subsided, it’s time to focus on our main objective - **defeating Steve King in the general election in November and liberating the constituents of Iowa’s 4th CD of his 16-year reign of misrepresentation.** To do that, we need to redouble our efforts at this time, by building up a general election war chest and focusing on expanding both our team and our outreach - thereby putting together a campaign and a field program like never before seen in this district. And to do that, we’re going to need your help! [**_Please say you’re in with a contribution of any size today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1383689/7552432/-1153034295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGRhODZhZC1hZDZkLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80wakumH5PBzchN8yJv2KWzhJ22RhIwOD3BeorksO9I=)
My job as Chief Financial Officer on the campaign is to raise enough money to help fund this movement for change in northwestern Iowa. To that end, I spend practically every day on the phones, reaching out to many of you and asking for your support. It’s going to take a true national movement if we’re going to beat Steve King, as well as be able to compete with the corporate and PAC support that he receives. **Steve King is not just Iowa’s problem, he’s a national problem,** and that’s why phone calls and emails like this one are so important to our cause. There’s an old expression; “strike when the iron is hot”. Well, after our primary win last week, the political iron is scalding and opportunity is knocking - the opportunity to finally send Steve King to the congressional retirement home. [**_Help us continue to grow this movement with a donation today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1383690/7552433/-1153034295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGRhODZhZC1hZDZkLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80wakumH5PBzchN8yJv2KWzhJ22RhIwOD3BeorksO9I=)
We’ve outraised Steve King two quarters in a row - no small feat in and of itself - but we can’t afford to get complacent now. If we can do it a third time, it will put King and the Republican Party on notice and people will start to wake up to the fact that this race is winnable and Steve King can be beaten. But again, we can’t do this without you. [**_Please consider a gift of whatever you can comfortably contribute_**** _,_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1383691/7552434/-1153034295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGRhODZhZC1hZDZkLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80wakumH5PBzchN8yJv2KWzhJ22RhIwOD3BeorksO9I=) as your support means everything and is the key to **finally giving Steve King the boot!** Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Lewis H. Cohen
Chief Financial Officer
Scholten4Iowa

name: Save the Net (via Team Lipinski)
subject: YOUR ANSWER: is net neutrality dead?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter, today marks the official end
of net neutrality protections in our country.

Starting today, the big cable companies will be able to
charge people like you extra based on what you do online and
control what online content you have access to.

We cannot let that go unchecked.

The Senate overturned the FCC’s repeal in May, which means
the House of Representatives now has until the end of the year to
hold a vote.

We need you to make your voice heard on this issue. Respond
to our INSTANT POLL by midnight tonight to have your vote
instantly recorded.

INSTANT POLL: Should Congress vote to overturn the repeal
of net neutrality?

YES

body:
| | | |
---
| | | **|FNAME|*,**
For too long the liberal left have held a monopoly on creative talent in this fight. We will change that.

I know JFK had a theme song with Frank Sinatra, but Frank isn't available and I don't know if Frank was Republican.

Introducing the Sykes campaign theme song:

["DAYS LIKE THIS"](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=fdae1d6097&e=9da9b0ca31) by Channing.

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=0a43362d72&e=9da9b0ca31)

**We need to revive and redefine the way that we share our Conservative message and our values.**

**We fight for tradition, for family values, for our faith. **

**We stand up against all odds in the name of liberty and under God.** **We remember the past while fighting for a future with no bounds. **

**We are proud that Lady Liberty has been a shining light in a world too often dark. **

We stand as individuals indivisible who together make America the beacon in which freedom finds solace.

_**As Conservative Republicans we must remember that these values are why we are standing on this side of the fight. **_

**[God willing, we will continue in strength, we will go forth, we will win.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e0a0b5d5a5&e=9da9b0ca31)**

Courtland and Chanel

body:
#
Peter \--
A few weeks ago, our campaign manager sent you an email about a mysterious “Philbert” -- turns out, this is him:
Displaying an interest in American politics at an early age, Philbert wandered into our campaign office on Friday, and he’s stolen our hearts. Now we’re teaming up with The Cat Shoppe in Nashville to help find Philbert a good home here in Tennessee.
[**We wanted to check in with you and see if you could either help us find a new home for Philbert, or if you’d like to make Philbert a part of your own family! body:

| | **Our Tweeter-in-Chief has once again used his 280 characters to attack Debbie.** Perhaps if Trump spent more time paying attention to policy and less time cyber-bullying his political adversaries, his administration wouldn't be a dumpster fire. Nevertheless, it's up to us to help Debbie fight back. [**_To counter Trump's newest attack, we're asking 280 donors to give $2.80, $28, or more in the next 28 hours. Can you be one of the first?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f29/622b7b5b/1b33a806/307b814e/1466680761/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180611a?refcode=dwse180611a_m&recurring=true&amount=2.8") Trump might be attacking Debbie by name, but in effect he's attacking each and every one of us on this team. Her goals are our goals. Her values are our values. Debbie fights to protect health care access, Planned Parenthood, Medicare, Social Security, and more. She's working to hold Trump accountable for his words and actions. She's fighting to stop Republicans in Congress from making life harder for working families and easier for the already-privileged. And because Debbie speaks out, Donald Trump keeps on attacking her. [**_We all need to step up and respond to these ridiculous attacks. So if you can -- don't wait around. Be one of the 280 donors to give in the next 28 hours._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f29/622b7b5b/1b33a806/307b814e/1466680761/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180611a?refcode=dwse180611a_m&recurring=true&amount=2.8") Twitter may be Trump's top form of communication, but the things we're fighting for can't be confined to 280 characters or less. And we must continue to fight beside Debbie. Thank you for all of your help today. Team DWS

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Joe Biden**
Date: Wed, June 6, 2018
Subject: We can't afford to lose Bob Casey.

Hi folks,

The Pennsylvania Senate race has been in the news a lot lately, so I wanted to clear a few things up.

Now is not the time to get complacent. Keeping this Senate seat will be an uphill climb. And I'll be climbing alongside you.

Because it is absolutely essential that we win and send Bob Casey back to Washington to keep fighting for middle-class families.

When Bob sees a problem, he commits to doing the hard work of solving it -- for instance, he's the reason we have the Campus SaVE Act, landmark legislation to help prevent campus sexual assault.

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0bd/2a380d31/eb73c90/f1973e/2499498693/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0bd/2a380d31/eb73c90/f1973e/2499498693/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Donald Trump has made it his mission to attack a woman's right to make decisions about her own health care since his first day in office.
His latest attack--imposing the 'Gag Rule' and gutting Title X -- is one of the most egregious to date. It's a thinly veiled attempt to defund Planned Parenthood and the critical health care services it provides.
This could result in millions of people losing access to preventative care and family planning services, so we have to fight back.
Here's the link to our petition urging Trump to stop attacking a woman's right to make her own health care decisions. Will you please sign? We need your voice.
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Reproductive-Rights**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0bd/2a380d31/eb73c90/f1973f/2499498693/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_reproductive-rights%3Frefcode%3D20180611_TitleXJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
Trump's restrictions will make it MUCH harder for organizations like Planned Parenthood, health care providers and medical clinics to give essential information to women as they make important decisions about their health.
Even worse? They'll disproportionately affect poor and uninsured women who are most at-risk.
[**If you 're ready to do something about these attacks on reproductive health care, please click here to sign our petition.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0bd/2a380d31/eb73c90/f1973f/2499498693/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_reproductive-rights%3Frefcode%3D20180611_TitleXJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
Thank you for speaking out against the Trump administration's anti-woman agenda.
-- Team Maggie

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Trump, Pence, and Paul Ryan vs. Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
In 2012, Republican groups spent $19 million to defeat Joe. In 2018, they'll spend tens of millions of dollars again - and again. |
---

| | Peter -- Looks like history is repeating itself.

In 2012, few people thought Joe would win. But then we outhustled his opponent every single day, talked to every single voter, and reminded them that not only was Joe the right choice to represent Hoosiers in the Senate, but our opponent was the wrong choice for Indiana.

**In 2018, Joe 's opponent is also the wrong choice for Indiana.** He claimed he'll create jobs -- but then we found out his company stiffed workers and imported parts from overseas. He claimed he'll lower taxes -- but then we learned that he actually voted to _raise_ taxes on Hoosiers (while writing laws that lower them for himself!).

**The only question remaining is, will we be able to repeat our 2012 success in 2018?_That depends on you, Peter._ Will you chip in to give us the resources Joe needs to WIN in November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c218e/7377f838/3c4451a1/51f93c32/2221295010/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-beatsuperpacs?refcode=20180611.1nd")**
Here's another similarity between 2012 and this year. In 2012, Republican groups spent $19 million to defeat Joe. In 2018, they'll spend tens of millions of dollars again -- and again. They'll almost certainly exceed their 2012 number and make this Senate race the most expensive in the country.

But what's different? The big players on the other side. **President Trump has campaigned against Joe (and Kellyanne Conway just announced that _Joe is one of Trump 's top targets_). Mike Pence has campaigned against him, too. Paul Ryan just came out for his opponent.** Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers have been working to defeat Joe for months.

But are you ready for one more similarity? Just like in 2012, we CAN stand up to them. But it's going to take every single person reading this giving it all they've got. This campaign depends on grassroots resources -- it depends on _you_ , Peter.

**[Will you chip in now to help us protect Indiana's voice in the Senate and win in November?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c218e/7377f838/3c4451a1/51f93c2d/2221295010/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-beatsuperpacs?refcode=20180611.1nd&amount=10")**

\-- Team Donnelly

It's just another tool in Republicans' arsenal to discourage minority voter turnout -- people who they know are more likely to vote Democratic. And Republicans in other red states will use this decision to throw away folks' right to vote without facing any repercussions.

body:
|
---

| | | **Stand against President Trump and Attorney General Jeff Sessions ' family separation policy
[Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Keep Families Together Act >>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b9ca/43d8135f/614ca036/5100a512/1588776365/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/co-sponsor-keep-families-together-act?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Become+a+citizen+cosponsor+of+the+Keep+F&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1")**
Team,

Last month, Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced one of the cruelest policies yet from the Trump administration: family separation for immigrants crossing our borders or attempting to seek asylum.

Children are being taken away from their mothers and fathers, with no chance of saying goodbye and no way to keep in touch. As a parent, I can't imagine the pain this is causing families. Trump and Sessions' policy is truly inhumane, unconscionable, and extreme.

**That is why I am taking action and fighting for legislation to stop this horrific policy. The Keep Families Together Act would prevent the Department of Homeland Security from taking children away from their families at the border.**

I'm also demanding we immediately hold hearings on this administration's cruel and inhumane family separation policy.

[**We must pass this legislation immediately so we can end the horrific policy of family separation. Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of my bill to help raise awareness and get it passed as quickly as possible?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b9ca/43d8135f/614ca036/5100a515/1588776365/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/co-sponsor-keep-families-together-act?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+must+pass+this+legislation+immediatel&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1")

[BECOME A CO-SPONSOR](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b9ca/43d8135f/614ca036/5100a514/1588776365/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/co-sponsor-keep-families-together-act?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+BECOME+A+COSPONSOR&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_30DO_180611_1_1")
Not only is family separation a way to terrify immigrant families, but it's illegal. The UN has called for an immediate end to the practice because it is a serious violation of the rights of the children being taken from their families.

We are better than this. We should not be breaking families apart and putting children at risk.

[**My bill is the first step in righting this wrong, but I need your help if we are going to pass this bill. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Peter,**

See below the letter to you from Judge Roy Moore of Alabama. Judge Moore gave his full and exclusive endorsement for Courtland's U.S. Senate race against Leftist Democrat Claire McCaskill of Missouri.

**Why this matters very much to you:**

_We hold the 100 seat senate by two votes. If we lose the senate, the Trump initiatives are over._

**Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about:**
---
|

_Judge Roy Moore and Courtland Sykes_
---
* God and Family First
* Pro-Strong Military
* Pro-Wall
* Pro-Gun
* Pro-Law Enforcement
* Pro-Lower Taxes
* Pro-Energy
* Pro-School Choice
* Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda
* Oppose-Globalism
* Oppose-Green Lunacy
* #1 Constitutional Conservative
* America Number One
* MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=293cfde3eb&e=9da9b0ca31) | [Share](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=293cfde3eb&e=9da9b0ca31)
---|---
| | [](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=c41f3c9914&e=9da9b0ca31) | [Tweet](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=c41f3c9914&e=9da9b0ca31)
---|---
| | [](http://us17.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=a69c0bf0d7&e=9da9b0ca31) | [Forward](http://us17.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=a69c0bf0d7&e=9da9b0ca31)
---|---
| Dear Peter,

**I am deeply honored to announce today, that Judge Roy Moore of Alabama on Friday, unequivocally endorsed my candidacy** for the Missouri U.S. Senate seat now held by Democrat socialist liberal and close friend of Obama, Clinton, Schumer and Pelosi—my opponent the infamous leftist Claire McCaskill.

_**We have to defeat her. She is the enemy of everything we hold dear.**_

[_Read Roy Moore's endorsement of my candidacy here_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=a980594c13&e=9da9b0ca31) and know how deeply honored I feel to be thought well of by Judge Moore and to have been chosen by this judicious and discerning fighting man for conservatism.

**No man in public life today has shown greater courage in standing up again and again for our conservative causes than Judge Moore. No man. **

**ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL**
---
| I campaigned with Judge Moore and his family on the ground in Alabama last November, during his Senate race. I appeared and spoke at his rallies and we became friends and my respect for him and his family only grew.
---
___My Campaign for Judge Moore in Alabama_
---
| **DUTY BOUND**

I thank Judge Moore for the great honor of his recommendations and I feel duty bound to carry forth with those amazing spirits of conservative and constitutional courage and family togetherness that Judge Moore has always stood for and shown us no matter what personal toll the vicious liberal left have exacted from him and his family.

**AMERICAN LEGEND**

Judge Moore, a West Point graduate and Vietnam veteran is a legend and a towering figure in Alabama and a historic national figure in America.

**HE STANDS UP

For decades he has stood up for God, family, country and liberty—no matter what—and he has absolutely no peer in public life. There is no one like him.** If you know about Judge Roy Moore already—America's Ten Commandments judge, then you already know what he stands for and how much it has cost him in personal tranquility to stand up and how viciously he has been reviled—almost to biblical proportions—by fake news, false accusers, tainted justice and by twisted big money newspaper liberals like Soros and Bezos and the _Washington Post._ They will invent and print absolutely any lie about absolutely anyone, no matter how preposterous—in order to steal any election and to destroy any conservative person or value.

**FAKE ACCUSATION PLAN**

**_Now they think they have a formula to destroy conservatism for 2018 and beyond_**—the fake accusation plan—they will use hired "victims"—women who take money, paid in cash or in fame to star in last-minute "pop-up stories" written too late to defend. No matter the stories are invented. No matter the women are paid.

**ELECTION THIEVES**

We can't let election thieves like the _Washington Post_ or Bezos loot America, buy newspapers and take any more ground or any more elections. They can't steal our country or our values because they own a newspaper or hire a row of side-alley women or thuggish reporters.

**THIS IS WAR**

**This is war—and war needs warriors** who can inflict political war casualties on the left—mean, deadly political damage they won't recover from. In war the defense must equal the offense.
---
| [_**Watch the film my team made**_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=93825284fc&e=9da9b0ca31) —I was the only national political candidate who defended Judge Moore—[ _watch the film and weep for your country and for all innocent men._](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=93825284fc&e=9da9b0ca31) **Know how venal fake news liberalism really is and how they are about to steal congress in 2018 and steal your country.**
---
_[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=93825284fc&e=9da9b0ca31)_[_Documentary Film by Courtland Sykes for Judge Moore_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=93825284fc&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **FAKE HARASSMENT AND ELECTION THEFT**

Did you think all the news about "harassment"—story after story was just a coincidence? _Of course not._
**
It's prelude for the 2018 election and beyond **but thanks to watching and documenting the "hit" the _Washington Post_ and big media made on Judge Roy Moore—we're ready for them—there will be no surprise in 2018.

**Freedom is too precious, and liberty too rare to stand idly by as the warm seas of socialism lull us and sweep over us. **

**OBAMA'S UGLY TRUTH**

Obama and "Reverend” Wright showed us their ugly truths—and showed us how the long night of tyranny begins—as socialism takes America slowly.

I don't know about you but during those Obama years, I would rise every day, hear Washington news and think: _What? This can't be my country anymore. _And as every day passed—my country disappeared more and more. **What about you?**
---
| **THANK GOD IN PRAYER**

I thank God in prayer each day for that great Trumpian reprieve—one of the most joyful days of my life—I shall never forget that next day after that late November night in 2016.

I tremble to remember the relief I felt when Donald Trump, a most imperfect man, brought us his astounding victory and our country's reprieve.

God works in mysterious ways—through sometimes improbable and mysterious men.

President Trump, like Judge Moore, feared nothing and stood up to anything. Like Judge Moore has. **_As we all must._**
---

_Courtland Sykes and fiancee Chanel Rion with Trump Family at Victory Celebration in New Hampshire Primary 2016._
---
| _**I believe God has given America one more chance to get our house in order.**_** **

Only months from now the campaign for president starts again. It's hard to believe. Only _23_ _ _ weeks from now the fate of Trump, MAGA, America First and freedom itself—may be decided in primaries. In November 2018—fast approaching—the _midterm elections will determine whether Pelosi and Schumer are back in control and President Trump is done_ —complete with impeachment proceeds without cause. **If they win in the Senate, there will be no additional Supreme Court Justices.**

**WE MUST WIN**

**Make no mistake—we are done if we lose—in 23 weeks.** We hold the 100 seat Senate by only 2 votes—the 435 seat house by only 23 votes—by only 5%. We are in jeopardy.

California alone has 53 house seats—ALL of them up for election in 23 weeks. **If we get comfortable we lose. **_We can't stop._ _Every seat counts._

**Help me.**** **_I am the most stand up guy running for the Senate anywhere today._ Judge Roy Moore thinks so.

I may not be running in your state but think— _the people who are stopping Trump and the MAGA agenda in the Senate aren't from your state either._

**_Today, every Senate race_ **determines your country—every race is a national race—** _America depends on every seat_** —** _every seat._

_Help me keep the Senate safe_ **and throw out forever the sneakiest liberal in America—Claire McCaskill of Missouri. **_I'm the only Republican in this race who can actually defeat her_.** I make national noise that gets national traction for other conservatives everywhere (look for yourself).

**I can defeat her because I am a proven warrior, because I never quit and because I represent only you and conservatism. _I don't care about me. I care about our cause._ Zero special interests. Not one. **
---
|
---

**I LEAVE YOU WITH THIS:**
But for the intervening hand of God and the faith of us all, Donald Trump would not be our president today—and the long dark night of our republic would be upon us— _the third Obama term and the end of our Supreme Court, our guns, our freedom, our hopes._

Hillary Clinton and her ruinous regime would have imprisoned our land—with the shame of the Clinton Crime Family, Bill Clinton and all their corrupt pals and cronies. How about Obama for the Supreme Court? Think not? Think again.
|
---
_Obama and McCaskill Celebrating the Future_
| **It's 19 weeks and counting** —and our future depends on you and me. **We can only win if we start right now. **This is combat. Nothing less. I need you.

**Will you help me?**

Courtland Sykes

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, See below the letter to you from Judge Roy Moore of Alabama. Judge Moore gave his full and exclusive endorsement for Courtland's U.S. Senate race against Leftist Democrat Claire McCaskill of Missouri. Why this matters very much to you: We hold the 100 seat senate by two votes. If we lose the senate, the Trump initiatives are over. Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about: | Judge Roy Moore and Courtland Sykes God and Family First Pro-Strong Military Pro-Wall Pro-Gun Pro-Law Enforcement Pro-Lower Taxes Pro-Energy Pro-School Choice Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda Oppose-Globalism Oppose-Green Lunacy #1 Constitutional Conservative America Number One MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Dear Peter, I am deeply honored to announce today, that Judge Roy Moore of Alabama on Friday, unequivocally endorsed my candidacy for the Missouri U.S. Senate seat now held by Democrat socialist liberal and close friend of Obama, Clinton, Schumer and Pelosi—my opponent the infamous leftist Claire McCaskill. We have to defeat her. She is the enemy of everything we hold dear. and know how deeply honored I feel to be thought well of by Judge Moore and to have been chosen by this judicious and discerning fighting man for conservatism. No man in public life today has shown greater courage in standing up again and again for our conservative causes than Judge Moore. No man. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL | I campaigned with Judge Moore and his family on the ground in Alabama last November, during his Senate race. I appeared and spoke at his rallies and we became friends and my respect for him and his family only grew. _My Campaign for Judge Moore in Alabama | DUTY BOUND I thank Judge Moore for the great honor of his recommendations and I feel duty bound to carry forth with those amazing spirits of conservative and constitutional courage and family togetherness that Judge Moore has always stood for and shown us no matter what personal toll the vicious liberal left have exacted from him and his family. AMERICAN LEGEND Judge Moore, a West Point graduate and Vietnam veteran is a legend and a towering figure in Alabama and a historic national figure in America. HE STANDS UP For decades he has stood up for God, family, country and liberty—no matter what—and he has absolutely no peer in public life. There is no one like him. If you know about Judge Roy Moore already—America's Ten Commandments judge, then you already know what he stands for and how much it has cost him in personal tranquility to stand up and how viciously he has been reviled—almost to biblical proportions—by fake news, false accusers, tainted justice and by twisted big money newspaper liberals like Soros and Bezos and the Washington Post. They will invent and print absolutely any lie about absolutely anyone, no matter how preposterous—in order to steal any election and to destroy any conservative person or value. FAKE ACCUSATION PLAN Now they think they have a formula to destroy conservatism for 2018 and beyond—the fake accusation plan—they will use hired "victims"—women who take money, paid in cash or in fame to star in last-minute "pop-up stories" written too late to defend. No matter the stories are invented. No matter the women are paid. ELECTION THIEVES We can't let election thieves like the Washington Post or Bezos loot America, buy newspapers and take any more ground or any more elections. They can't steal our country or our values because they own a newspaper or hire a row of side-alley women or thuggish reporters. THIS IS WAR This is war—and war needs warriors who can inflict political war casualties on the left—mean, deadly political damage they won't recover from. In war the defense must equal the offense. | —I was the only national political candidate who defended Judge Moore— Know how venal fake news liberalism really is and how they are about to steal congress in 2018 and steal your country. | FAKE HARASSMENT AND ELECTION THEFT Did you think all the news about "harassment"—story after story was just a coincidence? Of course not. It's prelude for the 2018 election and beyond but thanks to watching and documenting the "hit" the Washington Post and big media made on Judge Roy Moore—we're ready for them—there will be no surprise in 2018. Freedom is too precious, and liberty too rare to stand idly by as the warm seas of socialism lull us and sweep over us. OBAMA'S UGLY TRUTH Obama and "Reverend” Wright showed us their ugly truths—and showed us how the long night of tyranny begins—as socialism takes America slowly. I don't know about you but during those Obama years, I would rise every day, hear Washington news and think: What? This can't be my country anymore. And as every day passed—my country disappeared more and more. What about you? | THANK GOD IN PRAYER I thank God in prayer each day for that great Trumpian reprieve—one of the most joyful days of my life—I shall never forget that next day after that late November night in 2016. I tremble to remember the relief I felt when Donald Trump, a most imperfect man, brought us his astounding victory and our country's reprieve. God works in mysterious ways—through sometimes improbable and mysterious men. President Trump, like Judge Moore, feared nothing and stood up to anything. Like Judge Moore has. As we all must. Courtland Sykes and fiancee Chanel Rion with Trump Family at Victory Celebration in New Hampshire Primary 2016. | I believe God has given America one more chance to get our house in order. Only months from now the campaign for president starts again. It's hard to believe. Only 23 weeks from now the fate of Trump, MAGA, America First and freedom itself—may be decided in primaries. In November 2018—fast approaching—the midterm elections will determine whether Pelosi and Schumer are back in control and President Trump is done —complete with impeachment proceeds without cause. If they win in the Senate, there will be no additional Supreme Court Justices. WE MUST WIN Make no mistake—we are done if we lose—in 23 weeks. We hold the 100 seat Senate by only 2 votes—the 435 seat house by only 23 votes—by only 5%. We are in jeopardy. California alone has 53 house seats—ALL of them up for election in 23 weeks. If we get comfortable we lose. We can't stop. Every seat counts. Help me. I am the most stand up guy running for the Senate anywhere today. Judge Roy Moore thinks so. I may not be running in your state but think— the people who are stopping Trump and the MAGA agenda in the Senate aren't from your state either. Today, every Senate race determines your country—every race is a national race— America depends on every seat — every seat. Help me keep the Senate safe and throw out forever the sneakiest liberal in America—Claire McCaskill of Missouri. I'm the only Republican in this race who can actually defeat her. I make national noise that gets national traction for other conservatives everywhere (look for yourself). I can defeat her because I am a proven warrior, because I never quit and because I represent only you and conservatism. I don't care about me. I care about our cause. Zero special interests. Not one. | I LEAVE YOU WITH THIS: But for the intervening hand of God and the faith of us all, Donald Trump would not be our president today—and the long dark night of our republic would be upon us— the third Obama term and the end of our Supreme Court, our guns, our freedom, our hopes. Hillary Clinton and her ruinous regime would have imprisoned our land—with the shame of the Clinton Crime Family, Bill Clinton and all their corrupt pals and cronies. How about Obama for the Supreme Court? Think not? Think again. | Obama and McCaskill Celebrating the Future | It's 19 weeks and counting —and our future depends on you and me. We can only win if we start right now. This is combat. Nothing less. I need you. Will you help me? It's a victory for Ohio's Republican Secretary of State John Husted, who has tried every trick in the book to keep Democrats from voting. **Fortunately, we have an incredible Democratic candidate running for Secretary of State in Ohio: Voting rights champion Kathleen Clyde.** Electing Kathleen in November will be an enormous victory for those of us who believe in PROTECTING, not ATTACKING our sacred right to vote! [Fight back against the voter purge! Chip in $20.18 or any amount to elect Kathleen and support our efforts to elect leaders who will stand up for voting rights >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9297/5486deaa/285b085d/dcc0fc2/2475023200/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180611_voterpurge_30&amount=20.18") [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9297/5486deaa/285b085d/dcc0fc2/2475023200/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_clyde?refcode=em20180611_voterpurge_30&amount=20.18") Ohio's Republican Secretary of State John Husted instituted a policy of removing names from the state voter rolls if they don't vote in two years and don't mail back a specific voter card. **Let's be clear: This policy does _nothing_ for democracy -- all it does is keep more Americans from exercising their rights.** This policy deliberately penalizes young people, women, veterans, and working-class Ohioans who are more likely to change addresses or work long shifts that keep them from voting. name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Friend,

It was another busy week on the campaign trail.

Mitch McConnell and one of his out-of-state groups started running dishonest attack ads against Joe. The ad is so false, our campaign's attorney is demanding that the TV stations to pull it down. [Click here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsv2q6MYCr7uqFS3ZO6LNkbIcq2Ta3LIrLLYmab3G9bObRE7Or52nzYtrg42xov2dCDOh6%2fXmUyUXba34%2bNbvV%2fGK%2fYLepX1bMgpQZy%2fnpEnopqROw3fDl3WpGBIbWjwjkQp8Pd6EYf09vpvc4FaWgNvkmdOmpYF08%3d) to learn more about it.

This is only the first wave of vicious attacks that West Virginia will be seeing from McConnell and his friends in the Washington establishment. They are attacking Joe because he is independent and never afraid to do what's best for West Virginia. Expect more of this in the coming months.

Our grassroots campaign is too strong to have dirty political ads stop our momentum. Team Manchin was spreading Joe's positive message across West Virginia this weekend. We had representatives at events across the state. Here are a few highlights:

Biker Bash

This weekend, Team Manchin was out in force for the 7th annual Biker Bash in Charleston. Joe loves to ride his Harley and support West Virginia bikers.

Thank you to all of the volunteers who helped staff our booth.

North-South Football Game

Joe flipped the coin at Saturday's North-South Football Classic at South Charleston High School.
Joe In the News

Wheeling Intelligencer: [Early Polls Show Manchin in Front in US Senate Race](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKcvCUINtMjzHCn%2bJPNmqtH9Sn9cl6AEOIxInskFBGlLOH3T7j%2bzpJ6PLllgq6K4MzRXIKe3D2vFIcfZM8wfGjSvvsUv6vflHQXUFsg1HmIndX6oLiRaIedtAfH7JxQRtxjOuuiCNVrxTUVp4btK%2bUDG%2bfFE4kJ4bCAYN10pRzgQ49Fx0kIjPs68lACAddgCdLMrx97vpuk6oBHkS4hnx9RZuVtdPQssntw%3d%3d)

Three early polls conducted in the race for U.S. Senate in West Virginia -- including one Republican survey -- show Democrat Sen. Joe Manchin leading the race by as much as 13 percentage points.

Register-Herald: [Black Lung Coal Miner Clinics Program to receive $1.8 million](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKQkTFXbMcbVr3AQbkpNLf%2fELnnkBt9deR%2buqMN8KSGD%2fgmvDWJ2y48u%2f2HcvuFfPuxLw0dZPdA6CmMRLTEMemVKWljAi1N8kGWY9TuWXgyp%2fDPuv%2b9mgX7l%2bTgA9RyRqtOuEBGsPbS887sFzxscKC7e%2b%2fnFX5OYFlN2F%2flkAncgNahlFzPqhu%2b8EkG9SO5nEt7Ky%2fx35c5FGN7Zg%2bb0GLrbH6HoNV8KkEXnWlWOCcOWkH58Wz1Ee%2ffw4WsTS94aqKw%3d%3d)

U.S. Senators Joe Manchin (D-WV) and Shelley Moore Capito (R-WV) have announced $1,786,069 in funding for the West Virginia Department of Health and Human Resources for the Black Lung Coal Miner Clinics Program through the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.

Charleston Gazette-Mail: Daily Mail short takes: Joe channeling A.James Manchin is asking a television network not to cast West Virginia in a negative light with a new "reality show," West Virginia Wilder.

Manchin said he watched a trailer for the show, which is a reboot of the reality series "Buckwild" that aired on MTV, and sent a letter Thursday to Viacom's president saying the network can make a compelling show about West Virginia "that does not play into vicious stereotypes."

Beckley Register-Herald: [Manchin secures language to ensure an Amtrak ticket agent is in West Virginia](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKQkTFXbMcbVr3AQbkpNLf%2fELnnkBt9deR%2buqMN8KSGD%2fXAjpa5MJkK5zWGl4wz54TEIUnfLORLLz%2fiJEFbtl9u1jjI7T%2fZKn0BhkXSWPx45IGlU7ZhzFNKjeIrcayUfklPIrPJ2%2bVElWkc4gHHhCpbyRaOqdMve2ZsVu2DSKXln2qWUUdKywuiIlY1quVGbbba%2f7%2fWZWQPgEvElyMq85yzTdOGrQaYHs0ZwDgt7qkD9jNGkEw45MeugHcIgcbG0BoQ%3d%3d)

U.S. Senator Joe Manchin (D-WV) secured language in the FY19 Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies appropriations bill that will ensure Amtrak has to employ one ticketing agent in every state, including West Virginia. This comes after weeks of Senator Manchin fighting to keep the one and only ticketing agent in West Virginia after Amtrak announced they were terminating the position, which took effect yesterday.

It's All About West Virginia,

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The Paris climate accord & you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name: We need 100,000 people to demand climate justice.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79385/2f5ea88d/70880dc7/2cbcf612/3469897984/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja") Friend, The U.S. could lead the world in the fight against climate change. But now, thanks to President Trump's withdrawal from the Paris Agreement in June of last year, we are the ONLY country in the world not committed to stopping climate change. You and I know it: Since Trump took office, he's been a disaster for the environment. In the face of scientific facts (which he doesn't believe), he's rolled back clean air and water regulations, diminished the power of the EPA, and threatened our public lands. In the year since Trump announced that he would withdraw the United States from the Paris climate agreement, he's been leading a one-man band of climate denial toward global disaster. [**Join me and progressive leaders across the country to demand climate action: Tell Trump to honor our obligation to the Paris climate accord!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79385/2f5ea88d/70880dc7/2cbcf612/3469897984/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79385/2f5ea88d/70880dc7/2cbcf612/3469897984/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
---
Trump's anti-science agenda jeopardizes our health and safety. But his absolute failure has allowed Democratic governors to step forward and lead on climate change. We've stepped into the vacuum of leadership left behind by Washington D.C., and we're making a huge difference.
Expanding clean energy jobs is one of the reasons numerous new outlets like CNBC have named Washington state the top economy in the nation -- and we're not alone. The president can't stop me or Democratic governors in California or Minnesota; he can't stop governors in New York or Hawaii. We're moving forward with or without him.
But if we're going to really address climate change, we need to act as one planet. We must raise our voices together and demand change -- before it's too late.
[**Right now, we need 100,000 people to sign our petition to demand climate justice. Together, we can make a difference. Will you add your name?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79385/2f5ea88d/70880dc7/2cbcf612/3469897984/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
[SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79385/2f5ea88d/70880dc7/2cbcf612/3469897984/VEsD/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
---
When progressives stand united, nothing can stop us.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
